Name: TrickRabbitSnowCollect
Notes: Controls a Star Bunny chase minigame and spawns a Power Star once all linked Star Bunnies (TrickRabbitSnow) have been caught.

Obj_arg0.Name: Time Limit
Obj_arg0.Description: Time limit for the minigame in seconds. Default is 180.

Message.Description: The text message ID to be used. Needs to be specified in the zone's text file.
